<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: $branches = git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)' refs/remotes/origin | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^origin/', '' } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -ne 'HEAD' -and $_ -ne 'dev' } | Sort-Object -Unique; if ($branches.Count -gt 0) { git push origin --delete $branches }; git fetch origin --prune; git branch -r</summary>

```bash
$branches = git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)' refs/remotes/origin | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^origin/', '' } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -ne 'HEAD' -and $_ -ne 'dev' } | Sort-Object -Unique; if ($branches.Count -gt 0) { git push origin --delete $branches }; git fetch origin --prune; git branch -r
```
